marketing.classes: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8 py-24 px-6 md:px-12

dashboards.classes: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 p-6
dashboards.cards: bg-[#FAF9F6] border border-[#E5E1D8] rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow

hero_landing.description: Delivery person riding bicycle on tree-lined street

restaurant_hero.description: Baked potato covered in cheese and broccoli

food_item_1.description: Three baked potato halves with butter on a rustic wooden tray

dublin_context.placement: Background for role selection or about section

components.navigation: Use crystal glassmorphism for public pages, solid background with sharp bottom borders for dashboards.
components.buttons: Rounded full (rounded-full) for primary marketing CTAs, rounded-md for dashboard utilities.
components.charts: Use Recharts/Shadcn for payment splits. Use Brand Primary (#1E3F20) and Brand Accent (#D97746).
components.data_display: Minimalist cardless tables in dashboards. Border-b only.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle hover:-translate-y-1 and hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300 on interactive cards.
motion_and_interactions.loading: Use skeleton loaders matching the exact shape of the content to be loaded.

testing.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case format (e.g., login-submit-button, order-track-status).

feature_specific_rules.student_rider: Use a circular progress indicator for the 20h limit. Warn with brand accent color when close to limit.
feature_specific_rules.payment_split: Display a horizontal stacked bar showing Rider/Restaurant/Platform split.

instructions_to_main_agent: Never use placeholder images. Rely entirely on the provided media_urls.
Strictly follow the Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) color palette.
Do not center-align everything; use deliberate asymmetry in marketing sections.
Prioritize Shadcn components for complex interactions (Forms, Modals, Tabs, Select).
